zh-CN: 学习投资于知识总能得到最好的利息
en-US: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest

zh-CN: 求知是人类的本性
en-US: All men by nature desire to know

zh-CN: 教育的根是苦的，但果实是甜的
en-US: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet

zh-CN: 未经审视的生活不值得过
en-US: The unexamined life is not worth living

zh-CN: 教育不是灌满一桶水，而是点燃一把火
en-US: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire

zh-CN: 读一本好书，就是与一位高尚的人对话
en-US: A room without books is like a body without a soul

zh-CN: 今天也要元气满满地学习哦！💪
en-US: Let's study with full energy today! 💪

zh-CN: 一个人的心灵需要知识来滋养
en-US: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled

zh-CN: 学习如逆水行舟，不进则退
en-US: Learning is like rowing upstream; not to advance is to drop back

zh-CN: 知识给人以重量，成就给人以光彩
en-US: Knowledge gives weight, but attainments give luster

zh-CN: 今天比昨天更聪明一点点！✨
en-US: A little bit smarter today than yesterday! ✨

zh-CN: 知识是通向自由的道路
en-US: Knowledge is the path from slavery to freedom

zh-CN: 今天的努力是明天的奇迹！🌟
en-US: Today's effort is tomorrow's miracle! 🌟

zh-CN: 智慧不会向我们走来，我们必须勤奋思索
en-US: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it

zh-CN: 学习是唯一不会背叛你的投资
en-US: Learning is the only thing the mind never exhausts, never fears, and never regrets

zh-CN: 教育是点燃心灵的火焰
en-US: Education is kindling a flame, not filling a vessel

zh-CN: 保持好奇心，世界更精彩！🌈
en-US: Stay curious and the world becomes wonderful! 🌈

zh-CN: 求知若渴，虚心若愚
en-US: Stay hungry, stay foolish

zh-CN: 今天又学到新东西啦！📚
en-US: Learned something new today! 📚

zh-CN: 知识就像花园，需要耐心浇灌
en-US: Knowledge is like a garden, if it is not cultivated, it cannot be harvested

zh-CN: 努力吧，今天也要超越昨天的自己！💫
en-US: Work hard and surpass yesterday's self! 💫

zh-CN: 学而时习之，不亦说乎
en-US: Is it not pleasant to learn with a constant perseverance

zh-CN: 学习是点亮思想的火炬
en-US: Learning is the torch that lights the mind

zh-CN: 学习改变思维，思维改变命运
en-US: Learning changes thinking, thinking changes destiny

zh-CN: 每天进步一点点就很棒！⭐
en-US: A little progress each day is amazing! ⭐

zh-CN: 知识就像蜡烛，能照亮一个人，也能照亮无数个人
en-US: Knowledge is like a candle that can light one person and countless others

zh-CN: 今天的努力不会辜负明天的梦想！🌟
en-US: Today's effort won't let down tomorrow's dreams! 🌟

zh-CN: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆
en-US: Learning without thinking is useless; thinking without learning is dangerous

zh-CN: 保持学习的热情，永远年轻！💝
en-US: Stay passionate about learning, stay young forever! 💝

zh-CN: 学习是通往自由的道路
en-US: Learning is the path to freedom

zh-CN: 知识给人以重量，成就给人以光彩
en-US: Knowledge gives weight, achievements give luster

zh-CN: 让学习成为一种生活方式！✨
en-US: Make learning a way of life! ✨

zh-CN: 学习永远不晚，成功永远可能
en-US: It's never too late to learn, never too late to succeed

zh-CN: 智慧源于学习，学习来自实践
en-US: Wisdom comes from learning, learning comes from practice

zh-CN: 学习是进步的阶梯，知识是成功的基石
en-US: Learning is the ladder of progress, knowledge is the cornerstone of success

zh-CN: 学而知之，思而得之
en-US: Learn to know, think to gain

zh-CN: 读万卷书，行万里路
en-US: Read ten thousand books, travel ten thousand miles

zh-CN: 知识是智慧的源泉
en-US: Knowledge is the fountain of wisdom

zh-CN: 越学习，越发现自己无知
en-US: The more I learn, the more I discover my ignorance

zh-CN: 生如夏花之绚烂，死如秋叶之静美
en-US: Let life be beautiful like summer flowers and death like autumn leaves

zh-CN: 你今天是一个忧愁的梦，明天你将是一个快乐的现实
en-US: You are today a sad dream, tomorrow you will be a joyful reality

zh-CN: 当你为错过太阳而哭泣的时候，你也要再错过群星了
en-US: If you shed tears when you miss the sun, you also miss the stars

zh-CN: 生命不止，奋斗不息
en-US: Life means struggle

zh-CN: 愿你在此生中，收获一场又一场的欢喜
en-US: May you have happiness to make your days bright

zh-CN: 做自己，其他角色都已经有人演了
en-US: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken

zh-CN: 生活就像一盒巧克力，你永远不知道下一颗是什么味道
en-US: Life is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you're gonna get

zh-CN: 希望是美好的，也许是人间至善，而美好的事物永不消逝
en-US: Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies

zh-CN: 昨天已成历史，明天还未可知，今天是上天的礼物
en-US: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift

zh-CN: 我们都生活在阴沟里，但仍有人仰望星空
en-US: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars

zh-CN: 黑夜无论怎样悠长，白昼总会到来
en-US: However long the night, the dawn will break

zh-CN: 生存还是毁灭，这是一个问题
en-US: To be or not to be, that is the question

zh-CN: 有些鸟儿是关不住的，它们的羽毛太鲜亮了
en-US: Some birds are not meant to be caged, their feathers are just too bright

zh-CN: 当你凝视深渊时，深渊也在凝视着你
en-US: When you gaze into the abyss, the abyss gazes also into you

zh-CN: 真正的智慧在于承认自己一无所知
en-US: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing

zh-CN: 时间是治愈一切的良药
en-US: Time heals all wounds

zh-CN: 路漫漫其修远兮，吾将上下而求索
en-US: The way ahead is long; I see no ending, yet high and low I'll search with my will unbending

zh-CN: 在最深的绝望里，遇见最美丽的惊喜
en-US: In the depth of winter, I finally learned that there was in me an invincible summer

zh-CN: 未选择的路让一切变得不同
en-US: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I took the one less traveled by, and that has made all the difference

zh-CN: 永远不要、永远不要、永远不要放弃
en-US: Never, never, never give up

zh-CN: 有志者事竟成
en-US: Where there's a will, there's a way

zh-CN: 做最好的自己
en-US: Be the best version of yourself

zh-CN: 追随你的心，但要用你的头脑
en-US: Follow your heart, but take your brain with you

zh-CN: 没有什么比今天更重要的了
en-US: There is no greater gift than the present moment

zh-CN: 伟大来自于平凡的坚持
en-US: Greatness comes from ordinary persistence

zh-CN: 星空不会因为一个人的眼泪而失去光辉
en-US: The stars will not dim because of one person's tears

zh-CN: 困难是生活对我们的考验
en-US: Difficulties are life's tests for us

zh-CN: 你若盛开，蝴蝶自来
en-US: When you bloom, butterflies will come

zh-CN: 要么读书，要么旅行，身体和灵魂，总有一个在路上
en-US: Either read or travel. Your body and soul, one must be on the way

zh-CN: 成功的秘诀就是每天都比昨天进步一点点
en-US: The secret to success is to improve a little bit every day

zh-CN: 勇气不是没有恐惧，而是战胜恐惧
en-US: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it

zh-CN: 行动是治愈恐惧的良药
en-US: Action is the antidote to fear

zh-CN: 每一次跌倒，都是为了更好地站起来
en-US: Every fall is a chance to rise stronger

zh-CN: 改变世界，从改变自己开始
en-US: Change the world by changing yourself first

zh-CN: 今天是余生的第一天
en-US: Today is the first day of the rest of your life

zh-CN: 相信你可以，你就已经成功了一半
en-US: Believe you can and you're halfway there

zh-CN: 岁月不居，时节如流，但美好永远值得期待！🌈
en-US: Time flows like a river, but beautiful moments are always worth waiting for! 🌈

zh-CN: 每个黎明都带来新的希望
en-US: Every dawn brings new hope

zh-CN: 凡是过往，皆为序章
en-US: What's past is prologue

zh-CN: 生活中最大的幸福是坚信有人爱我们
en-US: The supreme happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved

zh-CN: 黑暗中，一星独明
en-US: In the darkness, one star shines alone

zh-CN: 爱是唯一理智的行为
en-US: Love is the only sane and satisfactory answer to the problem of human existence

zh-CN: 真正的贵族精神，是优于过去的自己
en-US: True nobility is not about being superior to others, but being superior to your former self

zh-CN: 我想成为你的小太阳，不是光芒万丈，而是温暖如常
en-US: I want to be your little sun, not shining brightly, but always warm

zh-CN: 勇敢的心，是最好的护身符
en-US: A brave heart is the best protection

zh-CN: 世界上只有一种真正的英雄主义，那就是认清生活的真相之后依然热爱生活
en-US: There is only one heroism in the world: to see the world as it is, and to love it

zh-CN: 如果你想要彩虹，你就得容忍雨水
en-US: If you want the rainbow, you gotta put up with the rain

zh-CN: 最美的不是下雨天，是曾与你躲过雨的屋檐
en-US: The most beautiful thing is not the rainy day, but the roof that sheltered us from the rain

zh-CN: 人生没有彩排，每天都是现场直播
en-US: Life has no rehearsal, every day is a live performance

zh-CN: 时间会证明一切，也会带走一切
en-US: Time will prove everything and take everything away

zh-CN: 我们都是星尘，我们都是金色的
en-US: We are stardust, we are golden

zh-CN: 不是因为困难而不敢，而是因为不敢而困难
en-US: It is not because things are difficult that we do not dare; it is because we do not dare that things are difficult

zh-CN: 所有的结局都是新的开始，只是当时不知道
en-US: Every ending is a new beginning, we just don't know it at the time

zh-CN: 做一个温暖的人，用自己的光芒照亮世界
en-US: Be a warm person, light up the world with your own glow

zh-CN: 愿你历尽千帆，归来仍是少年
en-US: May you return as a teenager after experiencing countless adventures

zh-CN: 今天也要微笑着拥抱生活哦！😊
en-US: Embrace life with a smile today too! 😊

zh-CN: 别让别人告诉你你成不了才
en-US: Don't ever let somebody tell you you can't do something

zh-CN: 抓住今天，让生命非凡
en-US: Carpe diem. Seize the day, make your lives extraordinary

zh-CN: 假如再也见不到你，祝你早安、午安、晚安
en-US: In case I don't see you, good morning, good afternoon, and good night

zh-CN: 追求卓越，成功就会追着你跑
en-US: Chase excellence, success will follow

zh-CN: 真正重要的东西，眼睛是看不见的
en-US: What is essential is invisible to the eye

zh-CN: 你在你的玫瑰上花费的时间，使你的玫瑰变得重要
en-US: It is the time you have wasted for your rose that makes your rose so important

zh-CN: 所以我们继续奋力向前，逆水行舟
en-US: So we beat on, boats against the current

zh-CN: 生命中真正重要的不是你遭遇了什么，而是你记住了哪些事
en-US: What matters in life is not what happens to you but what you remember

zh-CN: 你永远不可能真正了解一个人，除非你穿上他的鞋子走一走
en-US: You never really understand a person until you consider things from his point of view

zh-CN: 记住该记住的，忘记该忘记的
en-US: Remember what should be remembered, and forget what should be forgotten

zh-CN: 我贫穷、低微、不美、渺小，我们的灵魂却是平等的
en-US: Do you think I am poor, obscure, plain, and little? Our spirits are equal

zh-CN: 明天又是新的一天
en-US: Tomorrow is another day

zh-CN: 不要温和地走进那个良夜
en-US: Do not go gentle into that good night

zh-CN: 幸福不是终点，而是旅程
en-US: Happiness is not a destination, it is a journey

zh-CN: 人生最大的荣耀不在于永不跌倒，而在于每次跌倒后都能站起来
en-US: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall

zh-CN: 当你想要某样东西时，整个宇宙都会帮你实现愿望
en-US: When you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it

zh-CN: 生活总会有办法的
en-US: Life finds a way

zh-CN: 最深沉的爱，总是风雨兼程
en-US: The deepest love is always there, through thick and thin

zh-CN: 过去无法改变，但未来可以
en-US: The past can hurt, but you can either run from it or learn from it

zh-CN: 一个人可以被毁灭，但不能被打败
en-US: A man can be destroyed but not defeated

zh-CN: 人活着不是为了证明苦难，而是亲历过黑暗，才配拥有光明
en-US: We live not to prove suffering, but to deserve light after darkness

zh-CN: 死亡不是生命的终点，遗忘才是
en-US: Death is not the end, forgetting is

zh-CN: 即使明天是世界末日，今天也要种下一棵苹果树
en-US: Even if tomorrow is the end of the world, plant an apple tree today

zh-CN: 黑暗中，即使是一丝微光也能照亮前路
en-US: In darkness, even a glimmer can light the way

zh-CN: 真正的勇气是明知会输，也要去做
en-US: Real courage is when you know you're licked before you begin, but you begin anyway

zh-CN: 只有一件事会使人疲劳，摇摆不定和优柔寡断
en-US: There is only one thing that makes a dream impossible to achieve: the fear of failure

zh-CN: 普通并不等于平庸
en-US: Ordinary does not mean mediocre

zh-CN: 不要让任何人打乱你的节奏
en-US: Don't let anyone mess up your rhythm

zh-CN: 你的任务不是去寻找爱，而是寻找并发现你内心筑起的所有障碍
en-US: Your task is not to seek for love, but to find all the barriers within yourself

zh-CN: 不被理解的弱小总好过故作强大
en-US: Misunderstood weakness is better than feigned strength

zh-CN: 哪里会有人喜欢孤独，不过是不喜欢失望
en-US: No one likes being alone, they just don't like being disappointed

zh-CN: 最美的不是生如夏花，而是在时间的长河里，波澜不惊
en-US: The beauty is not living like summer flowers, but being calm in the river of time

zh-CN: 最深的孤独不是长久的一个人，而是心里没有了任何期望
en-US: The deepest loneliness is not being alone for long, but having no expectations in your heart

zh-CN: 世界上只有一种真正的英雄主义，就是认清了生活的真相后还依然热爱它
en-US: There is only one heroism in the world: to see the world as it is and to love it

zh-CN: 生命中最伟大的光辉不在于永不坠落，而在于坠落后总能再度升起
en-US: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall

zh-CN: 人生最难的不是如何生活，而是如何保持热爱生活
en-US: Life is not about how to survive the storm, but how to dance in the rain

zh-CN: 有些鸟儿天生就是关不住的，它们的羽毛太鲜艳，歌声太甜美
en-US: Some birds aren't meant to be caged, their feathers are just too bright

zh-CN: 追逐梦想，就算破碎也要捡起碎片继续走
en-US: Chase your dreams, even if broken, pick up the pieces and keep going

zh-CN: 满地都是六便士，他却抬头看见了月亮
en-US: The floor is full of sixpence, but he looked up and saw the moon

zh-CN: 我之所以活下来，不是因为我比别人坚强，而是因为我还有未完成的事
en-US: I survived not because I'm stronger, but because I have unfinished business

zh-CN: 弱者才会一蹶不振，你要记住你是谁
en-US: Only the weak give up, remember who you are

zh-CN: 我独自一人，走向新的生活
en-US: I walk alone towards a new life

zh-CN: 上善若水，水善利万物而不争
en-US: The highest good is like water, water nourishes all things without striving

zh-CN: 知人者智，自知者明
en-US: Knowing others is wisdom, knowing yourself is enlightenment

zh-CN: 给岁月以文明，而不是给文明以岁月
en-US: Give civilization to time, not time to civilization

zh-CN: 弱小和无知不是生存的障碍，傲慢才是
en-US: Weakness and ignorance are not barriers to survival, arrogance is

zh-CN: 我们都是阴沟里的虫子，但总还是得有人仰望星空
en-US: We are all worms in the gutter, but someone has to look up at the stars

zh-CN: 所谓伊人，在水一方
en-US: The one I long for is on the water's far side

zh-CN: 愿你出走半生，归来仍是少年
en-US: May you return still young after wandering half your life

zh-CN: 山川异域，风月同天
en-US: Though we are in different lands, we share the same moon and sky

zh-CN: 纵有疾风起，人生不言弃
en-US: Even if the wind rises, life never gives up

zh-CN: 心中有光，慢食三餐
en-US: With light in your heart, enjoy three meals slowly
